name: zapp

scripts.dev:zero-cache: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && bun scripts/db-preflight.ts && node scripts/zero-preflight.mjs && bunx zero-deploy-permissions --force -p src/schema.ts && bunx zero-cache-dev --app-publications zapp_app'
scripts.dev:api: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && bun run --watch api/server.ts'
scripts.dev:serve: bun run preflight:ports && concurrently -n api,css,app,zero -c cyan,blue,magenta,yellow "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:css" "bun run dev:app" "bun run dev:zero-cache"
scripts.dev: bun run dev:db-up & bun run dev:serve
scripts.dev:all: bun run dev:db-up & bash -c 'for i in {1..60}; do bun run db:migrate && break; sleep 1; done' && bun run db:seed && bun run dev:serve
scripts.dev:clean: bash -c 'source .env && RUNTIME=$(./scripts/detect-container-runtime.sh) && $RUNTIME volume rm -f docker_zstart_pgdata && rm -rf "${ZERO_REPLICA_FILE}"* && rm -rf .zero'
scripts.zero:reset: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && rm -rf "${ZERO_REPLICA_FILE}"* .zero && echo Reset local Zero replica state at ${ZERO_REPLICA_FILE}'
scripts.db:seed: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && bun run scripts/db-seed.ts'
scripts.build: bun run tsc -b && bun run build:css && bun scripts/build-app.ts

_: For some reason, sst requires esbuild 0.25.0 when deploying the permission deployer
